feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Transferring Cost Centers in a Service Organization
entry.content:
This is about the service organization of a project.
Due to organizational changes,
I would like to move the cost center linked to the service organization to another service organization.
To do this, I need to delete the target cost center from the original service organization and assign it to the new service organization.
However, if the project period is still ongoing, moving the cost center to the new service organization will result in an error when saving the project changes, as the service organization and cost center are not linked.
Please tell me how SAP standards should be changed when changing a service organization due to an organizational change.

entry.title: Sales Force To SAP Business Partner Intergration
entry.content:
Hello All,

Is this possible in SAP Public cloud to integrate Customer from Salesforce to SAP Public Cloud 

Customer will create/generate in Salesforce and it should directly fetch in SAP Public cloud from Sales force 

Customer having 3 roles General, Sales Area and Company code data which will create in Sales force against the address ID which are also different than SAP address ID and need to fetch it in SAP Public cloud.

Means totally customer generated in Sales force with all parameters having different bill to and ship to address ID only by integrating Sales force to Public cloud customer should come as it with only assigned number to BP in SAP Public Cloud.

Please guide on this requirement.

Regards,

Ashish

entry.title: Classification check table
entry.content:
Dear experts,

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, I am attempting to link a check table to a characteristic (CT04). I created a Custom Business Object  with a single field of type Text length 30 to match my characteristic's properties. However, I keep receiving the error: "Data format of check table does not match data format of characteristic." 

How do I create a valid check table in the Public Edition?

entry.title: Collection Management BFC - Payment promise with SEPA direct debit
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
We have set up the Scope Item BFC Collection Management in our company. Our customers want to use payment promises with the corresponding instalment plan.
Now a question has arisen: if a business partner is created in their master record with SEPA direct debit, how does this work with the instalment plan?

Example:
A customer has an invoice for £300 and wants to pay it in instalments of £100 per month. We create an instalment plan in the payment promise. Since they have SEPA direct debit, the money is automatically debited from their account. 
How can we set it up so that only the first instalment of the invoice is debited, i.e. £100 and not £300?

Can you please send me instructions or a solution? Or is it even possible?

Thank you in advance.
Best regards,

Nathalie

entry.title: KSEF - EDOC_COCKPIT - EDOCUMENT099 - EDOC_INTERFACE_CONNECTOR error.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

we are currently trying to implement KSeF in DRC. Our system is S/4HANA Public Cloud and DRC Public Edition. At the moment, we are dealing with the following problem. We cannot submit the invoice or display it, as shown in the screenshots below. When we try to submit it, we get a briefly described error "Check the eDocument application log", and we cannot find details on what might be wrong.

When we try to display document , we get more another error - "eDocument cannot be displayed; check implementation of BAdI EDOC_INTERFACE_CONNECTOR method DISPLAY_EDOCUMENT" , but all notes and advice from the official SAP pages concern ERP and not Public Cloud. Has anyone dealt with this problem, or can someone point out where we should look for the cause of the issue?

entry.title: CreateTest User ID for S/4HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Support Team,

We are currently preparing for the Functional Integration Testing (FIT) phase in our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Test Tenant and would like guidance on the recommended approach for setting up mass test users for manual testing.

Our requirement is to create multiple test user IDs in the test system and assign each of our custom business roles to dedicated test users. The objective is to test every custom role individually during the FIT phase to ensure that role authorizations, restrictions, and business catalogs are functioning as expected.

Specifically, we would like to understand:

What is the recommended approach in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for Test Users for testing purposes?
Are there SAP best practices for setting up test users during the Functional Integration Testing phase?

Our goal is to have one or more dedicated test users per custom role so that each role can be validated independently during manual testing.

We would appreciate any documentation, recommended procedures, or tools that SAP suggests for managing this scenario efficiently.

Thanks,

Ravi


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Need CDS View for attachments in S4HANA Cloud Public
entry.content:
Need CDS for attachment which are attached in Purchase Order, Sales Order, Vendor Master , Customer Master and Accounting Document.

entry.title: Request for Separate Exchange Rate Type for Purchases and Sales in SAP
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

Currently, the system is using exchange rate type M for both purchase and sales transactions.

However, we require separate exchange rate types for purchases and sales to maintain different rates for these transactions.

Kindly suggest the best approach to configure this in SAP and advise whether we need to create new exchange rate types for this requirement.

Looking forward to your guidance.

entry.title: SAP TM S4 Hana Public Cloud, How to distribute the cost of the freight based on the amount of PO.
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

Our customer wants to distribute the cost of the freight based on the price of the material of each PO and instead the weight or volumen, I have tried to change the Distribution Profile but I dont see the option to change from Weight to Net Value.

Do you know if the above questions is possible?

entry.title: Authorization problem creating Purchasing Requests
entry.content:
Authorization issue: Users are able to create purchase requests in unauthorized purchasing groups. - Example: A user with the role BR_CENTRAL_PURCHASER_ can create purchase requests in purchasing group G40 using document type NB, despite restrictions.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to move VC elements SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
We have enabled AVC in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. I have question - how should we move our VC elements (Characteristics/Class/Procedures/Dependency Net/Variant table/Config Profile/Super BOM) to SAP quality and Production system.

Is there any API or tool available to do such activity ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Revise the Business Partner Number Range Configuration
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I want to confirm the impact of editing the number range (From–To) directly in the Production system.

If a transport request (TR) is later transported from the Customizing system to Test and then to Production, will the transported configuration overwrite the existing number range settings that were manually adjusted in the Production system?

Customizing

Number Range No.Z1:   From Number: 0001000001  To Number: 0001999999

Production 

Number Range No.Z1: From Number: 0010000001  To Number: 0019999999

Best regards,

May

entry.title: Value Help Restrictions in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud – Do They Filter the F4 Help?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently analysing the behaviour of Value Help restrictions in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and would like to clarify whether my understanding of the concept is correct.

My question is not limited to a specific field, but concerns the general design of Value Help restrictions in business roles.

Background

In the Maintain Business Roles app it is possible to define Value Help restrictions for certain fields within an access category.

The expectation from a usability and security perspective would be that these restrictions limit the values displayed in the F4 value help, so that users only see entries they are allowed to use.

However, in my testing the behaviour appears different.

Example Scenario (Sales Order)

To illustrate the behaviour, I tested this in the sales order creation process.

Applications tested:

  • VA01 – Create Sales Order

  • F3893 –  (Fiori)

Goal:

Restrict the Sales Organization (VKORG) so that users can only work with a limited set of values.

Configuration steps:

  1. Open Maintain Business Roles.

  2. Edit the business role.

  3. Navigate to Restrictions.

  4. In the Sales Area section, maintain Value Help restrictions for Sales Organization.

  5. Example configuration:

    • Allow only a subset of Sales Organizations (e.g. 1710, 1720)

    • Alternatively test with no entries maintained.

Observed Behaviour

When the user creates a sales order and presses F4 on the Sales Organization field:

  • The value help always shows all Sales Organizations in the system.

  • The maintained value help restrictions are not reflected in the F4 help.

This happens in both:

  • VA01 (GUI)

  • Fiori app F3893

However, when the user selects a Sales Organization that should not be allowed and tries to continue or save the sales order, the system raises an authorization error, for example:

“You are not authorized for Sales Organization XYZ”

This indicates that the restriction is technically evaluated, but only during document processing, not during the value help selection.

 

Conceptual Question

My main question is about the general design of Value Help restrictions in S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Should Value Help restrictions:

Option A

Filter the F4 value help, so that users only see values they are authorized for.

or

Option B

Allow users to see all values in the value help, but enforce the restriction only when the document is processed or saved.

Additional Question

Independently of the Sales Organization example:

Is there any mechanism in S/4HANA Public Cloud that allows system-wide hiding of values in value help based on authorizations or restrictions?

In other words:

Is it generally possible that unauthorized values are not visible at all in F4 helps, or is the standard design that they remain visible and are only blocked during processing?

Any insights from others working with authorizations and business roles in S/4HANA Public Cloud would be very helpful.

Thank you.

David

entry.title: Request Detailed Information for Pre-delivered Posting Rules
entry.content:
Dear Team,

How to get detailed information for pre-delivered posting rules?

Thank you,

entry.title: Possibility to scrap or sell multiple Assets
entry.content:
Hello Team,

 

we are looking forward to sell multiple assets from a company .

 

we couldnot find any possibile solution in sap ..?

 

Regards,

zareena

entry.title: How to change the VAT number in the Billing document.
entry.content:
When a VAT registration number is changed in the Business Partner master data effective from a specific date (for example, 01.01.DIGITS), the system does not maintain time-dependency for this field.

As a result, when creating correction billing documents (such as credit memos or debit memos) with a billing date prior to the effective date of the VAT change, the VAT Registration Number cannot be modified in the billing document or on the printout.

Although the VAT number can be manually adjusted in the VAT control report, this leads to a discrepancy between the report and the printed billing document.

Question:

Is there a recommended approach or workaround to ensure that the correct VAT Registration Number is reflected in correction billing documents and their printouts when the VAT number has changed but historical documents need to reflect the previous value?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Creating Down Payment Request for Asset Using "Verify Down Payment Request" App
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

For processing a down payment request related to asset procurement, the request needs to be generated through the "Verify Down Payment Request" app in SAP.

To assist with this process, I would like to request a guideline outlining the required steps to create a down payment request for an asset using this application. A step-by-step instruction would be highly appreciated so that we can follow the correct procedure in the system.

entry.title: Guideline for Creating Down Payment Request for Asset
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

For processing a down payment request related to asset procurement, the request needs to be generated through the "Verify Down Payment Request" app in SAP.

To assist with this process, I would like to request a guideline outlining the required steps to create a down payment request for an asset using this application. A step-by-step instruction would be highly appreciated so that we can follow the correct procedure in the system.

entry.title: The Bill Note document number is not running according to the fiscal year.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to ask about the document numbering.
I currently use the "Manage Payment Receipt – Thailand" app to print the Bill Note document for customers.

However, the External ID number is not reset after the new year.
The Manage Payment Receipt – Thailand app continues running the External ID number from the previous year instead of restarting for the new year.

Please advise if there is any configuration that allows the External ID to reset by fiscal year.

Best regards,

May

entry.title: Post goods receipt referenced to "pending truck cargo e-bill"?
entry.content:
Hi community!

Can you help me with the following situation?

My customer loads its own trucks (set up as mobile storages) with gas and they immediately have to start selling the product (house by house). However the gas vendor takes some time to send the electronic truck Cargo Bill to headquarters. So I actually have a loaded truck (and I want to sell from there) but SAP has no stock since GR is missing until somebody posts the GR (after administration sends the Cargo Bill).  I would like the truck drivers to inform the received cargo manually so somebody can enter a manual GR against a "future reception of electronic cargo bill". When i receive the E-bill SAP verifies stated quantities. Does this make sense? Is there a standard movement to use instead / before 101 for GR?

Thank you! G.
